description: ClickHouse single-instance health summary: uptime, version, query rates, memory and connections. Panels adapted as a reference from the ClickHouse mix-in (Grafana dashboard 23415, github.com/ClickHouse/clickhouse-mixin, commit c54f56e0). Rebuilt on PMM's Apache-2.0 dashboard shell.

panels.description: Number of databases on the server.
panels.title: Databases

panels.description: Number of tables on the server.
panels.title: Tables

panels.description: Total active data parts across MergeTree tables.
panels.title: Active Parts

panels.description: Query, SELECT and INSERT execution rate.
panels.title: Query Rate

panels.description: Rate of failed queries. Sustained non-zero indicates errors.
panels.title: Failed Query Rate

panels.description: Total amount of memory tracked by the ClickHouse server.
panels.title: Memory Tracking

panels.description: Operating system total and available memory.
panels.title: OS Memory

panels.description: System load average over the last minute.
panels.title: Load Average (1m)

panels.description: Number of connections to the TCP/native protocol server.
panels.title: TCP Connections

panels.description: Number of connections to the HTTP server.
panels.title: HTTP Connections

title: ClickHouse Instance Summary
